summary: KOLO Final UI Corrections - Dark Mode Verification. All 7 features tested and verified: AI star icon gradient, + Add button gradient, Generate AI follow-up button gradient, disabled Create task button visibility, Notification prompt readability, Prospects text readability, and modal labels - all using correct blue-violet gradient (#004AAD → #CB6CE6) and proper dark mode colors.

ai_star_icon_gradient: 32x32px icon wrapper in AI suggestions block
add_button_gradient: '+ Add' / '+ Ajouter' button in AI suggestions
Code line 903 in AppShell.js confirms hardcoded gradient
generate_ai_followup_gradient: Button 'Générer une relance IA' / 'Generate AI follow-up'
Code line 1259 in AppShell.js confirms hardcoded gradient
notification_prompt_dark_mode: Component uses c() helper from useThemeColors hook
All text readable on dark background
prospects_text_dark_mode: Both colors have sufficient contrast for readability
aujourdhui_button_reference: Confirmed as reference for all AI elements

critical_code_review_comments: All AI element gradients correctly hardcoded as linear-gradient(90deg, #004AAD 0%, #CB6CE6 100%)
NotificationPrompt.js properly uses c() theme helper for all text colors
themes.css .btn-primary:disabled style correctly defined with var(--bg-alt) background
Prospect card CSS classes (.name, .contact) correctly use CSS variables that resolve to readable colors in dark mode
context_for_next_testing_agent: All dark mode UI corrections verified. Gradients for AI elements (#004AAD → #CB6CE6) match the 'Aujourd'hui' button. Disabled button visible with gray background. Text colors in Prospects and NotificationPrompt are readable using theme-aware c() helper and CSS variables.
